tool.name: aws_iam_analyzer
tool.description: Analyze AWS IAM policies for security vulnerabilities and privilege escalation paths.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Analyze IAM policies for dangerous permissions - Identify privilege escalation paths - Find overly permissive policies (wildcards, *) - Check for dangerous action combinations - Enumerate assumable roles and trust relationships

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The analysis action to perform: - analyze_policy: Analyze an IAM policy document for dangerous permissions - find_privesc_paths: Identify privilege escalation paths in policy - check_overpermissioned: Find overly permissive statements - enumerate_roles: Analyze role trust policies - full_audit: Run all checks on a policy

parameter.name: policy
parameter.description: IAM policy document as JSON string. Required for most actions.

parameter.name: policy_file
parameter.description: Path to IAM policy JSON file. Alternative to policy parameter.

parameter.name: role_trust_policy
parameter.description: Role trust policy document for enumerate_roles action.

returns.description: Analysis results with findings, severity ratings, and recommendations

tool.examples:
# Analyze an IAM policy for dangerous permissions
analyze_policy {"Version": "2012-10-17", "Statement": [...]}
# Find privilege escalation paths
find_privesc_paths policy.json
# Check for overly permissive policies
check_overpermissioned {"Version": "2012-10-17", "Statement": [{"Effect": "Allow", "Action": "*", "Resource": "*"}]}
# Full security audit of policy
full_audit iam-policy.json
